items.title: Bank stocks: The bearish case for the financial sector
items.description: Whalen Global Advisors Chairman Chris Whalen sits down with Myles Udland on Market Domination to share his investing perspective on the banking sector and the conditions these financial stocks would have to be in for Wall Street to retreat from the sector. To watch more expert insights and analysis on the latest market action, check out more Market Domination.

items.title: CORRECTION - JPMorgan Announces Cash Distributions for the JPMorgan ETFs
items.description: TORONTO, Sept. 23, 2025 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- In a release issued earlier today by JPMorgan Asset Management (Canada) Inc. under the same headline, please note the JPMorgan US Value Active ETF (JAVA) distribution per unit revised figure should be 0.10984 rather than 0.10964 as originally issued. The corrected release follows: J. P. Morgan Asset Management (JPMAM)* today announced the final September 2025 cash distributions for the below listed JPMorgan ETFs. items.title: Can Apollo's Inorganic Growth Efforts Make the Stock a Solid Pick?
items.description: APO accelerates growth with acquisitions, bank partnerships, and a $1.5T AUM target, aiming to boost earnings and shareholder returns.

items.title: Jamie Dimon: Trump's H-1B fee order 'caught everyone off guard'
items.description: JPMorgan Chase CEO Jamie Dimon said Tuesday the country’s largest bank will “hopefully” be engaged with the government on its recent executive order adding a $100,000 fee to a widely used foreign worker program, known as the H-1B visa.
